invariant_descriptions.ERS-0: discover_roles() is the sole role-assignment authority. Roles MUST NOT be manually assigned; they emerge from recorded behavioral evidence only.
invariant_descriptions.ERS-WINDOW-0: A role MUST NOT be discovered for an agent with fewer than SPECIALIZATION_WINDOW (50) recorded epochs.
invariant_descriptions.ERS-THRESHOLD-0: A role MUST NOT be discovered unless specialization_score >= SPECIALIZATION_THRESHOLD (0.65). Agents below threshold remain unspecialized.
invariant_descriptions.ERS-DETERM-0: Role classification is deterministic: identical behavior profiles produce identical EmergentRole objects. No datetime.now(), random, or uuid4.
invariant_descriptions.ERS-PERSIST-0: _save() uses Path.open('w') with sort_keys=True. _load() is fail-open: corrupt or missing state file never raises.

notes: Innovation #16 — Emergent Role Specialization. Roles emerge from behavioral evidence, not assignments. EmergentRoleSpecializer gates on SPECIALIZATION_WINDOW (50 epochs) and SPECIALIZATION_THRESHOLD (0.65 dominance) before classifying into 5 named archetypes. World-first: data-driven emergent role discovery for autonomous code evolution agents.
